title: Adventures Through Time & Space
description: Just the Adventures In Time mod with a few other mods i included. :D
body:
🚀 Adventures Through Time & Space – A Doctor Who-Inspired Modpack

Adventures Through Time & Space is a lightweight modpack centered around the Adventures in Time mod — a Doctor Who-inspired experience that puts you in control of your own TARDIS. Travel between dimensions, explore alien worlds, and face timey-wimey threats with a few carefully selected mods to enhance the fun without overwhelming your game.

This isn't a historical tour — it's a sci-fi sandbox with all the wibbly-wobbly goodness you'd expect from a time travel adventure.
